category_sources: official XiphWiki OggKate page describes Kate as an overlay codec for karaoke, text, subtitles, lyrics, and animated overlays multiplexed in Ogg
source_facts.description says overlay codec for multiplexed audio/video in Ogg
display_name_sources: official XiphWiki OggKate page refers to the libkate source distribution and API
docs_sources: official XiphWiki OggKate page provides format specification, API overview, downloading, HOWTOs, and FAQ
repo_sources: official XiphWiki OggKate downloading section states that a public git repository is available at gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/kate
tags_sources: official XiphWiki OggKate page describes Ogg multiplexing, subtitles, lyrics, karaoke, overlay text/images, and libkate API
